8709.title: 一个妈妈去帮她的孩子出来。

phrases.tokens_html: 一个妈妈去帮她的孩子出来。
phrases.translation: A mother goes to help her baby out.

phrases.tokens_html: 几个朋友一起出来。
phrases.translation: A few friends came out together.

phrases.tokens_html: 今天我们一直在这儿等。
phrases.translation: We've been waiting here today.

phrases.tokens_html: 又一次叫那么多人到这里。
phrases.translation: Called so many people here again.

phrases.tokens_html: 错过了这个时间就没有机会了。
phrases.translation: If you miss this time, there is no chance.

phrases.tokens_html: 只有两个孩子可以去。
phrases.translation: Only two children can go.

phrases.tokens_html: 你们做到了不错的事情。
phrases.translation: You guys did a great job.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们可以把一切发生的都忘记了。
phrases.translation: We can forget everything that happened.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要再犯同样的错误了。
phrases.translation: Don't make the same mistake again.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会感觉到很不一样。
phrases.translation: They may feel very different.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果有什么问题可以找我们。
phrases.translation: If you have any questions, you can contact us.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们需要一起去做这件事。
phrases.translation: We need to do this together.

phrases.tokens_html: 请大家一起来帮忙。
phrases.translation: Please come and help.

phrases.tokens_html: 看到那个地方真是太棒了。
phrases.translation: It was amazing to see that place.

phrases.tokens_html: 只要你们知道就行了。
phrases.translation: As long as you know it.

phrases.tokens_html: 还有什么可以做的事情。
phrases.translation: What else can be done.

phrases.tokens_html: 抱歉没能帮上忙。
phrases.translation: Sorry for not being able to help.

phrases.tokens_html: 我可以帮你们开启新的时代。
phrases.translation: I can help you start a new era.

phrases.tokens_html: 因为这里有很多朋友。
phrases.translation: Because there are many friends here.

phrases.tokens_html: 非常感谢你们这么多人来帮忙。
phrases.translation: Thank you so much so many of you for coming to help.

phrases.tokens_html: 叫那些你们不认识的人来帮忙。
phrases.translation: Call people you don't know to help.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果你有钱可以做任何事情。
phrases.translation: If you have money you can do anything.

phrases.tokens_html: 嗯，我们可以一起去打开这个东西。
phrases.translation: Well, we can go and open this thing together.

phrases.tokens_html: 让我们一起来看看这些东西吧。
phrases.translation: Let's take a look at these things together.

phrases.tokens_html: 爸爸妈妈都去了中国这个地方。
phrases.translation: Mom and Dad have gone to this place in China.

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么我们要回来这里呢？
phrases.translation: Why are we coming back here?

phrases.tokens_html: 但是他们没有办法做到这一点。
phrases.translation: But they have no way to do this.

phrases.tokens_html: 叫这些人也许不是最好的选择。
phrases.translation: Calling these people may not be the best option.

phrases.tokens_html: 准备好了就可以开始去做这件事了。
phrases.translation: When you're ready, you can start doing it.

phrases.tokens_html: 怎么样才能让这件事情发生呢？
phrases.translation: How can we make this happen?

phrases.tokens_html: 然后可以一起去找到那个东西。
phrases.translation: Then we can go find that thing together.

phrases.tokens_html: 不过最后他们还是找到了工作。
phrases.translation: But in the end they found work.

phrases.tokens_html: 谁也没有想到会发生这么多事情。
phrases.translation: No one expected so many things to happen.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们来找更多东西。
phrases.translation: They come for more.

phrases.tokens_html: 就是为什么要走了。
phrases.translation: That's why you're leaving.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们又去时间点。
phrases.translation: Let's go back to time.

phrases.tokens_html: 再拿几个孩子出来。
phrases.translation: Get a few more kids out.

phrases.tokens_html: 她得到了一样的家。
phrases.translation: She got the same home.

phrases.tokens_html: 什么也不能让你看到。
phrases.translation: Can't let you see anything.

phrases.tokens_html: 那么多人需要帮忙。
phrases.translation: So many people need help.

phrases.tokens_html: 叫他们准备好听我说。
phrases.translation: Get them ready to listen to me.

phrases.tokens_html: 然后把它带到里面。
phrases.translation: Then bring it inside.

phrases.tokens_html: 下一次我们一起出去。
phrases.translation: Let's go out together next time.

phrases.tokens_html: 这些事情可能很快就会发生。
phrases.translation: These things could happen very quickly.

phrases.tokens_html: 你们可以告诉我什么？
phrases.translation: What can you guys tell me?

phrases.tokens_html: 让我们看看怎么样吧。
phrases.translation: Let's see how it goes.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们认为这个工作太难了。
phrases.translation: They think the job is too difficult.

phrases.tokens_html: 妈妈叫我们回家。
phrases.translation: Mom called us home.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可能不相信我们。
phrases.translation: They may not believe us.

phrases.tokens_html: 这样就可以有更多的钱。
phrases.translation: That way you can have more money.

phrases.tokens_html: 只是准备好了让他们见到。
phrases.translation: Just be ready for them to meet.

phrases.tokens_html: 听说他们要去旅行。
phrases.translation: I heard they are going on a trip.

phrases.tokens_html: 一样的事情可以发生在这里。
phrases.translation: The same thing can happen here.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要抱歉，这是我的错。
phrases.translation: Don't be sorry, it's my fault.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们要尽快完成任务。
phrases.translation: We need to complete the task as soon as possible.

phrases.tokens_html: 有什么可以帮助你们？
phrases.translation: How can I help you?

phrases.tokens_html: 谢谢你们一直对我好。
phrases.translation: Thank you for always being nice to me.

phrases.tokens_html: 对不起，我不能做到。
phrases.translation: Sorry, I can't do it.

phrases.tokens_html: 让我们开始准备吧。
phrases.translation: Let's get started.

phrases.tokens_html: 爸爸也许会给我们带来礼物。
phrases.translation: Dad might bring us presents.

phrases.tokens_html: 今天我们可以一起去玩吗？
phrases.translation: Can we go play together today?

phrases.tokens_html: 现在我们有朋友可以和我们一起玩。
phrases.translation: Now we have friends we can play with.

phrases.tokens_html: 这么多的事情发生了，我们该怎么办？
phrases.translation: With so much going on, what should we do?

phrases.tokens_html: 只有一个人知道这里发生了什么。
phrases.translation: Only one person knows what's going on here.

phrases.tokens_html: 最后我们可以回家吃饭了。
phrases.translation: Finally we can go home and eat.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许我们可以找到一个解决方案。
phrases.translation: Maybe we can find a solution.

8712.title: 家就是一个安全的地方。

phrases.tokens_html: 家就是一个安全的地方。
phrases.translation: Home is a safe place.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果有事情发生，就请自己去解决。
phrases.translation: If something happens, go and fix it yourself.

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候，可能会说错话，但不要担心。
phrases.translation: Sometimes, you might say the wrong thing, but don't worry.

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候会有不同的感受，但也许可以做出选择。
phrases.translation: Feeling different sometimes, but maybe a choice can be made.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果有两个人一起做一件事，那么可以更快地完成它。
phrases.translation: If two people are doing something together, it can be done faster.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许有时间可以去找朋友，一起玩耍。
phrases.translation: Maybe there is time to find friends and play together.

phrases.tokens_html: 又或者可以告诉他们一些有趣的事情。
phrases.translation: Or maybe tell them something funny.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以带着家人出去玩，去新的地方。
phrases.translation: You can take your family out to play and go to new places.

phrases.tokens_html: 太多的东西可以做，可以尝试不同的东西。
phrases.translation: So much to do and try different things.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以买一些好吃的东西，或者做一些有趣的事情。
phrases.translation: You can buy something delicious, or do something fun.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果想去更远的地方，可以坐车去。
phrases.translation: If you want to go further afield, you can go by car.

phrases.tokens_html: 怎么样可以知道自己想要什么？
phrases.translation: How can you know what you want?

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候可能需要花一些时间来解决问题。
phrases.translation: Sometimes it may take some time to resolve the issue.

phrases.tokens_html: 时间就是一切，可以做很多事情。
phrases.translation: Timing is everything and can do a lot.

phrases.tokens_html: 把时间用在有意义的事情上，会让自己感到满足。
phrases.translation: Spending time on meaningful things will satisfy you.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要犹豫，应该尽早做准备，才能取得成功。
phrases.translation: Don't hesitate, you should prepare as early as possible to be successful.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许有时候需要花点时间来思考，知道自己想要什么。
phrases.translation: Maybe sometimes it takes a moment to think about what you want.

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候觉得自己可能做错了，但是有时候还是要坚持自己的想法。
phrases.translation: Sometimes I feel that I may be doing something wrong, but sometimes I still have to stick to my own ideas.

phrases.tokens_html: 两个人一起去做一件事，可以感受到不一样的感觉。
phrases.translation: When two people do something together, they can feel a different feeling.

phrases.tokens_html: 准备好以后可以去冒险，去做一些有趣的事情。
phrases.translation: When you're ready, you can go on an adventure and do something fun.

phrases.tokens_html: 不过也要注意安全，以免出现问题。
phrases.translation: But also pay attention to safety, in order to avoid problems.

phrases.tokens_html: 把时间用在孩子身上，可以让其成长得更好。
phrases.translation: Spending time on your child can make it grow better.

phrases.tokens_html: 要相信自己，做出比别人更好的事情。
phrases.translation: Believe in yourself and do better than others.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要害怕尝试新的东西，可能会有意想不到的收获。
phrases.translation: Don't be afraid to try new things, there may be unexpected gains.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以去做一些有意义的事情，可以改变自己的生活。
phrases.translation: You can do something meaningful that can change your life.

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候，做了一件事，可能会有一些后果，所以要小心。
phrases.translation: Sometimes, doing something, there may be some consequences, so be careful.

phrases.tokens_html: 当然，有时候也要学会放松，不要老是太紧张。
phrases.translation: Of course, sometimes you have to learn to relax and don't be too nervous all the time.

phrases.tokens_html: 有时候，要做的事情比想象的要多，所以要有耐心。
phrases.translation: Sometimes, there is more to do than imagined, so be patient.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以让自己的生活变得更精彩，可以去做一些有趣的事情。
phrases.translation: You can make your life more exciting, and you can do some interesting things.

phrases.tokens_html: 可能还有很多未知的东西，可以去探索，学习新的知识。
phrases.translation: There may still be many unknown things that can be explored and learned new knowledge.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以用一些方式来帮助别人，让大家一起过得更好。
phrases.translation: There are ways you can help others and make life better together.

phrases.tokens_html: 去做一些你喜欢的事情，让自己开心，让生活变得更美好。
phrases.translation: Do something you enjoy, make yourself happy, and make life better.

phrases.tokens_html: 把每一分钟都用在有意义的事情上，可以让自己更加充实。
phrases.translation: Spending every minute doing something meaningful can make you more fulfilled.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以去爱自己，去爱别人，一起度过美好的时光。
phrases.translation: It's okay to love yourself, love others, and spend quality time together.

8713.title: 那些朋友已经走了，这么多天还没有回来。

phrases.tokens_html: 那些朋友已经走了，这么多天还没有回来。
phrases.translation: Those friends have gone and haven't come back for so many days.

phrases.tokens_html: 觉得这里也许发生了什么事。
phrases.translation: Thought maybe something was going on here.

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么我们要去这个地方？
phrases.translation: Why are we going to this place?

phrases.tokens_html: 又开始拿出所有的钱来买东西。
phrases.translation: Started taking out all the money to buy things again.

phrases.tokens_html: 它还有让我们这么多时间去准备。
phrases.translation: It also gives us so much time to prepare.

phrases.tokens_html: 对不起，我们应该先去找到先生。
phrases.translation: Sorry, we should go find Mr.

phrases.tokens_html: 但是他们不知道怎么样才能回去。
phrases.translation: But they don't know how to get back.

phrases.tokens_html: 自己也觉得有点迷茫，所以只能干等。
phrases.translation: I also feel a little confused, so I can only wait.

phrases.tokens_html: 谁能告诉我们做什么？
phrases.translation: Can anyone tell us what to do?

phrases.tokens_html: 才把那个孩子带回家，又给他买了一些东西。
phrases.translation: Just took the kid home and bought him some things.

phrases.tokens_html: 怎么样才能把它变成一个真正的家？
phrases.translation: How can it be turned into a real home?

phrases.tokens_html: 也许可以用一些时间来谈话，但是他们看起来都很忙。
phrases.translation: Maybe some time for conversation, but they all looked busy.

phrases.tokens_html: 今天是一个很重要的时刻，我们都非常期待。
phrases.translation: Today is a very important moment, and we are all very much looking forward to it.

phrases.tokens_html: 谢谢你们一直陪着我，也谢谢你们给了我希望。
phrases.translation: Thank you for always being with me, and thank you for giving me hope.

phrases.tokens_html: 噢，我现在才明白，这些事情其实都是我自己的错。
phrases.translation: Oh, I realize now that these things are actually my own fault.

phrases.tokens_html: 这儿有很多的问题，我们需要一起去解决它们。
phrases.translation: There are many problems here, and we need to solve them together.

phrases.tokens_html: 该怎么办？我们需要一些帮助，但是没有人可以帮忙。
phrases.translation: what to do? We need some help, but no one can help.

phrases.tokens_html: 嘿，大家一起来，一切都会变得更好。
phrases.translation: Hey everyone, everything will be better together.

phrases.tokens_html: 但是我们可能还需要一点时间才能把它变得更好。
phrases.translation: But it might take us a little while to get it better.

phrases.tokens_html: 嗯，我们也许可以做出一些改变，让它变得更有趣。
phrases.translation: Well, maybe we can make some changes to make it more interesting.

phrases.tokens_html: 像比起一直等待，我们可以开始行动起来。
phrases.translation: Like instead of waiting, we can start taking action.

phrases.tokens_html: 小时候，我们也许会很害怕，但是现在我们可以勇敢地面对一切。
phrases.translation: When we were young, we might be scared, but now we can face everything bravely.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许我们可以像一家人一样，一起来享受这个时刻。
phrases.translation: Maybe we can enjoy this moment together as a family.

phrases.tokens_html: 发生什么事情？我们也认为我们应该做的事情。
phrases.translation: what happened? We also think we should do things.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们可以一起去看看，帮助彼此解决问题。
phrases.translation: We can go and see together and help each other solve problems.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们有一个家了，为什么还要去找更多的东西？
phrases.translation: We already have a home, why go looking for more?

phrases.tokens_html: 不过我们还是要努力，让一切变得更好。
phrases.translation: But we still have to work hard to make everything better.

phrases.tokens_html: 抱歉，我当时有点傻，没有看到你们的感受。
phrases.translation: Sorry, I was a bit silly and didn't see how you guys felt.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要害怕，我们一起来，一定可以找到答案。
phrases.translation: Don't be afraid, we will find the answer together.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们需要把这个世界变得更好，所以我们要更加努力。
phrases.translation: We need to make this world a better place, so we have to work harder.

phrases.tokens_html: 回来以后，我们会有更多的机会去改变一切。
phrases.translation: When we come back, we will have more opportunities to change everything.

phrases.tokens_html: 哦，我们可以一起去享受一下这个时刻，但是要把它变成我们永远都不会忘记的回忆。
phrases.translation: Oh, we can go and enjoy this moment together, but make it a memory we'll never forget.

8715.title: 那个妈妈只是想看看家里的钱。

phrases.tokens_html: 那个妈妈只是想看看家里的钱。
phrases.translation: That mom just wanted to see the money in the family.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许发生了什么不好的事情。
phrases.translation: Maybe something bad happened.

phrases.tokens_html: 小孩子们开始相信自己可以做出不一样的事情。
phrases.translation: Little children start to believe that they can make a difference.

phrases.tokens_html: 这个不要比也许。
phrases.translation: This is no better than maybe.

phrases.tokens_html: 你们怎么才能找到一个更好的地方去？
phrases.translation: How can you guys find a better place to go?

phrases.tokens_html: 它也许只是一个错误。
phrases.translation: It might just be a bug.

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么要把钱给那么多人？
phrases.translation: Why give money to so many people?

phrases.tokens_html: 让他们相信什么都可以发生。
phrases.translation: Make them believe anything can happen.

phrases.tokens_html: 相信一切都会起来的。
phrases.translation: Trust that everything will work out.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许只是一个很小的错误。
phrases.translation: Maybe just a small mistake.

phrases.tokens_html: 谢谢你们帮助我找到回来。
phrases.translation: Thank you for helping me find it back.

phrases.tokens_html: 它可能是一件非常了不起的事情。
phrases.translation: It can be a very remarkable thing.

phrases.tokens_html: 把钱拿出来可以让你们开始一段新的旅程。
phrases.translation: Taking the money out allows you to start a new journey.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要忘记你们能带回家的东西。
phrases.translation: Don't forget what you can take home.

phrases.tokens_html: 这些事情可能会发生，也许不会。
phrases.translation: These things may or may not happen.

phrases.tokens_html: 可以让一切变得更好，又能让他们回来。
phrases.translation: Can make everything better and bring them back.

phrases.tokens_html: 只要你们愿意，就可以找到一个更好的地方。
phrases.translation: You can find a better place if you want.

phrases.tokens_html: 这个小车可能不是最好的，但也许可以帮助到你们。
phrases.translation: This car may not be the best, but maybe it can help you.

phrases.tokens_html: 这么多的钱也许可以让你们开始一段新的旅程。
phrases.translation: So much money may allow you to start a new journey.

phrases.tokens_html: 叫它去做一件事情，可能会感觉很好。
phrases.translation: It might feel good to tell it to do something.

phrases.tokens_html: 如果不想发生什么事情，就不要去做。
phrases.translation: If you don't want something to happen, don't do it.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要忘记帮助别人，带走一些东西。
phrases.translation: Don't forget to help others and take something away.

phrases.tokens_html: 妈妈会让孩子们知道，一切都会变得更好。
phrases.translation: Moms let their kids know that everything will be better.

phrases.tokens_html: 让他们知道什么是对的，什么是错的。
phrases.translation: Let them know what is right and what is wrong.

phrases.tokens_html: 这里有一些钱，但是你们不要拿走。
phrases.translation: Here is some money, but don't take it away.

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么要把这么多的钱给他们？
phrases.translation: Why give them so much money?

phrases.tokens_html: 这么多的钱也许可以帮助你们找到出路。
phrases.translation: So much money may help you find your way out.

phrases.tokens_html: 发生了什么事情，让他们不再相信自己？
phrases.translation: What happened to make them stop believing in themselves?

phrases.tokens_html: 可能需要一些时间，但是最后会发现一切都会好起来。
phrases.translation: It may take some time, but in the end you will find that everything will be fine.

phrases.tokens_html: 抱歉，我不能带着你们一起回家。
phrases.translation: Sorry, I can't take you home with me.

phrases.tokens_html: 但是我们一起可以找到一个更好的地方去。
phrases.translation: But together we can find a better place to go.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要忘记你们可以做一些事情，来帮助你们走出困境。
phrases.translation: Don't forget that there are things you can do to help you out.

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么要把这些钱给他们？
phrases.translation: Why give them this money?

8717.title: 今天人们一直等着什么？

phrases.tokens_html: 今天人们一直等着什么？
phrases.translation: What have people been waiting for today?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可能叫你们一起去吃饭？
phrases.translation: Maybe they asked you to go to dinner?

phrases.tokens_html: 嗨，你们也许想去哪里？
phrases.translation: Hi, where might you want to go?

phrases.tokens_html: 很多孩子都喜欢去旅行？
phrases.translation: Many children like to travel?

phrases.tokens_html: 这儿有一辆车，准备带他们去地方？
phrases.translation: Here's a car ready to take them somewhere?

phrases.tokens_html: 你们可以看到一个小中国？
phrases.translation: Can you see a little China?

phrases.tokens_html: 真的很爱这些地方？
phrases.translation: Really love these places?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们开始准备一切，然后就可以出发了？
phrases.translation: They start to prepare everything, and then they can go?

phrases.tokens_html: 时间一直很快，但是他们还是把所有东西都准备好了？
phrases.translation: Time has been running fast, but they still have everything ready?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们只是想给自己一个机会去看看？
phrases.translation: They just want to give themselves a chance to see?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会找到一些非常有趣的事情？
phrases.translation: Maybe they'll find something really interesting?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也可能会给自己一个机会去做更多的事情？
phrases.translation: They might also give themselves a chance to do more?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们开始去哪里？
phrases.translation: Where do they start?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可能会去一些比较大的城市？
phrases.translation: They may go to some bigger cities?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以看到一些不一样的风景？
phrases.translation: Can they see something different?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会感觉到一个很新鲜的感觉？
phrases.translation: Maybe they will feel a very fresh feeling?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们开始知道他们去哪里，他们就可以准备一些东西？
phrases.translation: They start to know where they go, so they can prepare something?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们还可以和一些朋友一起去？
phrases.translation: They can also go with some friends?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以和朋友一起去见识不一样的东西？
phrases.translation: Can they go to see different things with their friends?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以看到一些他们从来没有见过的东西？
phrases.translation: Can they see something they've never seen before?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会发现一些他们从来没有知道的东西？
phrases.translation: Maybe they'll discover something they never knew?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以和一些当地的人一起去？
phrases.translation: Can they go with some locals?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以听到一些不一样的话？
phrases.translation: Can they hear something different?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会发现一些不一样的文化？
phrases.translation: Maybe they will discover some different cultures?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会有一些非常有趣的经历？
phrases.translation: They might have some really interesting experiences?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以尝试着做一些不一样的事情？
phrases.translation: Could they try to do something different?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会碰到一些新的朋友？
phrases.translation: Maybe they meet some new friends?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以把他们的经历带回来？
phrases.translation: Can they bring their experience back?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也可能会把一些新的东西带回家？
phrases.translation: They might also bring home something new?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以把这些经历和朋友一起分享？
phrases.translation: Can they share these experiences with their friends?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会有一些新的想法？
phrases.translation: Maybe they have some new ideas?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可以把这些想法带回家？
phrases.translation: Can they take those ideas home?

phrases.tokens_html: 他们也许会把这些想法带到他们日常生活中？
phrases.translation: Maybe they take these ideas into their daily lives?

8753.title: 祈祷之歌: 抱住叫做经理的千万祝福

phrases.tokens_html: 你听过那个叫做“千万”的歌吗？
phrases.translation: Have you ever heard that song called "Ten Million"?

phrases.tokens_html: 听过，真好听！
phrases.translation: I've heard it, it's so good!

phrases.tokens_html: 我抱歉，我是这个公司的经理。
phrases.translation: I'm sorry, I'm the manager of this company.

phrases.tokens_html: 没关系，太棒了！
phrases.translation: It's ok, it's great!
